zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 145 of file zsh.c.

145                                                          {
146   if (!output) {
147     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
148   }
149 
150   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
151                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
152                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
153                   "\n"
154                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
155                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == -* ]]; then\n"
156                   "    _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
157                   "    return\n"
158                   "  fi\n"
159                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line\n"
160                   "  _arguments \\\n"
161                   "    '1:mode:->mode' \\\n"
162                   "    '*::args:_ascii_chat_args'\n"
163                   "  case $state in\n"
164                   "    mode)\n"
165                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
166                   "      server_modes=(\n");
167 
168   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
169   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
170   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
171   if (mode_server_descs) {
172     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
173       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
174     }
175     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
176   }
177 
178   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
179                   "      client_modes=(\n");
180 
181   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
182   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
183   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
184   if (mode_client_descs) {
185     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
186       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
187       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
188         continue;
189       }
190       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
191     }
192     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
193   }
194 
195   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
196                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
197                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
198                   "      ;;\n"
199                   "  esac\n"
200                   "}\n"
201                   "\n"
202                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
203                   "  case $words[2] in\n"
204                   "    # Server-like modes\n"
205                   "    server)\n"
206                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
207                   "      ;;\n"
208                   "    discovery-service)\n"
209                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
210                   "      ;;\n"
211                   "\n"
212                   "    # Client-like modes\n"
213                   "    client)\n"
214                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
215                   "      ;;\n"
216                   "    mirror)\n"
217                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
218                   "      ;;\n"
219                   "    discovery)\n"
220                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
221                   "      ;;\n"
222                   "\n"
223                   "    *)\n"
224                   "      # Default mode (discovery)\n"
225                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
226                   "      ;;\n"
227                   "  esac\n"
228                   "}\n"
229                   "\n"
230                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
231                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
232 
233   /* Server options - grouped by category */
234   size_t server_count = 0;
235   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
236 
237   if (server_opts) {
238     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
239     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
240   }
241 
242   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
243                   "}\n"
244                   "\n"
245                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
246 
247   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
248   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
249   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
250       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
251 
252   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
253     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
254     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
255   }
256 
257   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
258                   "}\n"
259                   "\n"
260                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
261                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
262 
263   /* Client options - grouped by category */
264   size_t client_count = 0;
265   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
266 
267   if (client_opts) {
268     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
269     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
270   }
271 
272   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
273                   "}\n"
274                   "\n"
275                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
276 
277   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
278   size_t mirror_count = 0;
279   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
280 
281   if (mirror_opts) {
282     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
283     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
284   }
285 
286   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
287                   "}\n"
288                   "\n"
289                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
290                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
291 
292   /* For discovery mode, get all options (binary + mode-specific) in a single call */
293   size_t discovery_count = 0;
294   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
295 
296   if (discovery_opts) {
297     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
298     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
299   }
300 
301   // Return after all option sets are described (prevents zsh fallback completion)
302   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
303                   "}\n"
304                   "\n"
305                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
306 
307   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
308 }




References get_modes_by_group(), and
    options_registry_get_for_display().


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().
